report.invisible_to_plan: out-of-band CREATED resources — detection is the importer-kit account sweep (resourcegroupstaggingapi), disposition import-and-adopt or delete-in-AWS (human)

verdicts.recommendation: The resource exists in code+state but is GONE in AWS; the plan wants to recreate it. Decide: RECREATE or ACCEPT.
verdicts.neverDo: Never let a scheduled lane auto-recreate.
verdicts.executor: human decision; state surgery per state-recovery runbook
notes: resource_drift confirms the live object vanished
